title: 5X-Large SQL warehouse size (Public Preview)
body: The 5X-Large cluster size for serverless and pro SQL warehouses is in [Public Preview](/aws/en/release-notes/release-types) in all regions. The 5X-Large size provides 512 workers. Workspace admins can control access to this feature from the **Previews** page. See [Manage Databricks previews](/aws/en/admin/workspace-settings/manage-previews). For more information on SQL warehouse sizing, see [SQL warehouse sizing, scaling, and queuing behavior](/aws/en/compute/sql-warehouse/warehouse-behavior).

ref_links.text: SQL warehouse sizing, scaling, and queuing behavior
